executive_summary: Build failure detected in attempt 1 due to GitHub Actions workflow dispatch error. The workflow failed to trigger due to an internal server error (HTTP 500) from GitHub API.

errors.description: Failed to dispatch GitHub Actions workflow due to internal server error
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. Failed to run workflow dispatch
errors.root_cause: GitHub API returned 500 status code indicating internal server error on GitHub's infrastructure
errors.impact: Build cannot be triggered, blocking entire CI/CD pipeline

recommended_fix.automated_action: Retry workflow dispatch with exponential backoff
recommended_fix.manual_action: Verify workflow file exists at .github/workflows/build.yml and has correct permissions
verification_steps: Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository
Check repository permissions and GitHub token validity
Monitor GitHub Status page for API incidents
Retry dispatch after 5-10 minutes if GitHub API issue

errors.compliance_notes: Workflow dispatch failure logged for audit trail. No code changes required.

next_steps: Verify .github/workflows/build.yml exists and is properly configured
Check GitHub Actions permissions and token validity
Retry workflow dispatch after confirming GitHub API availability
If issue persists, check GitHub Status page for ongoing incidents
Consider implementing retry logic with exponential backoff in dispatch mechanism
